summary: Comprehensive testing of Touchpoints Offline feature. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working - tabs, offline type selection, guidance messages, needs_update card, type-specific icons.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/touchpoints/offline-types returns 4 types with correct metadata
Backend: Each offline type has correct default_fase_funil (Palestra=Topo, Imersao=Meio, Mentoria=Fundo, Midia=Topo)
Backend: All 4 types have 'dicas' (contextual tips) for custo_mensal, receita_gerada, conversoes, nota
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/touchpoints creates offline touchpoint with tipo_offline field saved
Backend: POST response includes {touchpoint, guidance} structure
Backend: Guidance message generated when nota=0
Backend: Guidance message generated when receita=0 but conversoes>0
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/touchpoints includes total_offline and total_online in stats
Backend: GET touchpoints includes page_guidance array
Backend: GET touchpoints includes needs_update array with touchpoint_id, nome, messages
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/personas returns persona_names array with 'Geral' default
Backend: PUT touchpoint returns guidance array
Backend: GET /api/touchpoints/options includes offline_types
Frontend: Touchpoints page loads with 5 tabs (Visao Geral, Offline, Funil, ROI & Financeiro, Analise IA)
Frontend: 'Novo Touchpoint' dialog opens correctly
Frontend: Ambiente='Offline' selection shows 'Tipo de Acao Offline' dropdown
Frontend: 4 offline types visible in dropdown (Palestra, Imersao, Midia, Mentoria)
Frontend: Selecting offline type pre-fills fase_funil and shows orientation message
Frontend: Type-specific guidance banner appears after selecting offline type
Frontend: Name field example shows type-specific naming convention
Frontend: Financial fields show type-specific contextual tips (dicas)
Frontend: Offline tab shows touchpoints grouped by type with correct icons
Frontend: Offline tab shows stats cards for each type (Palestra, Imersao, Midia, Mentoria)
Frontend: Empty state displays correctly with 'Nenhum touchpoint offline cadastrado'
Frontend: Needs Update card shows touchpoints requiring attention with update button
Frontend: Guidance toast notifications appear after creating touchpoint
Frontend: Principio Orientador box displayed in Offline tab
critical_code_review_comments: touchpoints.py: OFFLINE_TYPES array correctly defines 4 types with all required metadata (id, label, description, default_fase_funil, nome_exemplo, orientacao, metricas_obrigatorias, dicas)
touchpoints.py: get_guidance_messages() correctly generates warning for nota=0, info for receita=0 with conversoes>0, and success for 5+ monthly offline TPs
Touchpoints.js: handleOfflineTypeChange() correctly pre-fills fase_funil and nome from type definition
Touchpoints.js: Offline tab correctly groups touchpoints by tipo_offline with appropriate icons (Mic for palestra, BookOpen for imersao, Video for midia, Briefcase for mentoria)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed touchpoints during testing, cleaned up after tests completed

offline_types_endpoint.details: GET /api/touchpoints/offline-types returns 4 types with complete metadata

create_offline_touchpoint.details: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/touchpoints saves tipo_offline and returns guidance messages

guidance_messages.details: 3 types of guidance: warning (nota=0), info (receita=0 w/ conversoes), success (5+ monthly offline)

offline_stats.details: GET touchpoints returns total_offline, total_online, page_guidance, needs_update arrays

frontend_offline_tab.details: Dedicated Offline tab with type-grouped touchpoints, stats cards, principio orientador box

frontend_form_dialog.details: Offline type selection pre-fills fase_funil, shows orientation, contextual dicas

needs_update_card.details: Card appears when offline touchpoints need attention (nota=0 or receita=0 w/ conversoes)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Touchpoints Offline feature fully tested and working. 4 offline types (palestra, imersao, midia, mentoria) with business rules: default funnel phases, guidance messages, needs_update detection. All UI elements have data-testid attributes. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_touchpoints_offline.py covers all backend endpoints.
